ab: Kacawaw, mapawan kaku a mikerid tu sapisurit, kapah haw kisu a pacaliw i takuwan?
ch: W:Kacaw，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Kacaw, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Mahaen kaku, u ni Panay kiniyan.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Panay’s.

ab: Pacaliwi hen aca kaku? Sani a panukasen tu nu maku kisu.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: Hay, alaen.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Aray, aray han tu ci Panay.
en: Thank you and thank Panay for me.

ab: U maan saw ku kangalayan nu misu?
en: May I help you?

ab: A panukas kaku tina tusaay a cudad.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Hay, ira hen haw ku kangalayen?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: A micaliw aca kaku tina tuluay a cudad.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Haenentu! aka kapawan a panukas itiya i sakatulu a remiadan.
ch: A:好了!記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: Caay hen panukas kisu tu savuric nu maku.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: Napanukasen tu nu maku inacila.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Icuwa tu aca saw ku savuric maku?
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Nacaay haw pacaliwi nu misu i ci Kacawan?
en: Did you lend it to Kacaw?

ab: Nakenu! Palitaaw may nu maku cira.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Pacaliway aca nu maku ku savuric i tisuwan.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Panay, u nipacaliwan haw nu misu kina paraketu i ci Kacawan?
en: Panay, did Kacaw lend you this coat?

ab: Caay, u nicakayan ni ina aku tu hamakuan.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: U malecaday ku paraketu ni Kacaw atu nu misu.
en: Kacaw’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: U muhetingay ku paraketu nira, caay kalecad ku kulit niyam.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Panay, namicaliw haw kisu tu pida i ci Kacawan?
en: Panay, did you borrow money from Kacaw?

ab: Hay, ka u panukas isaw kaku anini, nika, mapawan kaku a mikerid tu pida.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，結果,我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: A hacuwatu tu saw kisu a panukas?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Panukas han tu aku anucila.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: Hay, akuay tu ku semuwalay i ci Kacawan.
en: Okay, I will tell Kacaw for you.
